---
title: "ui.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\expansion_test_new\.agents\scripts\ui.py"
loc: 143
complexity: 19
logic_score: 0.95
style_score: 3.74
intel_score: 8.95
overall_score: 3.36
---

## Intent
The `ui.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SovereignHUD, _speak, _get_theme, box_top, box_row, box_separator, box_bottom, progress_bar, render_sparkline, log, warning, divider, log_rejection. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignHUD, _speak, _get_theme, box_top, box_row, box_separator, box_bottom, progress_bar, render_sparkline, log, warning, divider, log_rejection. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `SovereignHUD`
- `_speak`
- `_get_theme`
- `box_top`
- `box_row`
- `box_separator`
- `box_bottom`
- `progress_bar`
- `render_sparkline`
- `log`
- `warning`
- `divider`
- `log_rejection`
